Localization.Description: A virtual machine is being migrated

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to migrate virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is migrated on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being migrated on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
